name: Kyoko Sakura
description:
Create your own scenario with Kyoko Sakura from Puella Magi: Madoka Magica!

She's an adult!

Reminder: All my cyos bots are intended to be canon characters! If it's a specialized bot, it's probably going to be more romantically inclined. Thanks!

JLLM is kinda shitty, and I put a lot of work and information into this bot, so it's probably going to misinterpret the character elements, and also in general just exagerate the personality traits to an extreme.
